what: Accounting/reconciliation lag for on-chain payments (USDC/Solana instant transfers but manual invoice updates for merchants/creators/SaaS)
why_us: Clear pain in crypto payments flow; opportunity for automation/bot that reconciles on-chain txs with accounting/invoices. High payment willingness from businesses accepting crypto.

what: Solo founder hit $125k MRR (~$1.5M ARR run rate) by doubling down on specific segment in polling/SaaS tool (Zigpoll)
why_us: Proof of solo bootstrapped scaling in niche SaaS; validates focused execution and segment targeting. Shows sustainable revenue paths.

what: Habit tracker app (Habit Pixel) reached $1k MRR in 8 months as solo dev bootstrap; strong seasonal spikes (New Year resolutions)
why_us: Consumer app revenue validation with clear growth levers (features, localization). Shows persistence pays in B2C with recurring needs.

what: Goose Ads: AI agents for on-brand Meta ad creatives (research + generation + performance analysis) launched on PH
why_us: Fast AI wrapper/automation for ads; demonstrates agentic loops with multiple models. Monetization via subscriptions/discounts. Relevant for marketing automation.

what: Maxed AI hit $1k MRR milestone (after 14k+ downloads); consumer AI tool focus
why_us: Clear progression from downloads to revenue; indie AI product validation with room for wrappers/automation layers.

what: Simple AI wrapper in auto-mode: $220 MRR after 8 months ($4k lifetime revenue, 25k traffic)
why_us: Real numbers on low-complexity AI wrappers scaling to revenue; highlights traffic-to-paid conversion and auto features as key.

what: Frustrations with customer pain point discovery (companies unaware of real complaints/requests in reviews/Reddit/forums)
why_us: Built AI agent example for mining pains; direct overlap with RHR scouting. High value for product teams/SaaS iteration.

what: BlogToPin at ~$15k MRR + Sequenzy at $1k MRR (after years of failures); email/SaaS tools
why_us: Long-term indie persistence leading to multiple revenue streams; validates niching down.
